response.justification: Candidate brings 15+ years of full-stack experience with strong recent TypeScript/Node.js work at Naver and Tencent, including AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling that directly matches the JD's AI agent requirement. Stack alignment is solid (TS, Node, React, MongoDB, Docker) though Nest.js and Vitest are not explicitly listed, and Kotlin/Java exposure is limited. Strong craftsmanship signal (TDD, CI/CD, workshops, OSS) makes them a high-probability fit worth interviewing.
strengths: Recent AI-agent and MCP code-generator work aligns with the AI agent requirement
Deep full-stack TS/Node/React experience at scale (Tencent, Naver, RIDE)
Strong engineering craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, OSS contributions, conference talks
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience mentioned in resume
Kotlin exposure is thin; Java usage appears dated (robotics, NI era)
Heavy DLang focus in side projects may signal divergence from primary JD stack
